title: Restore Us Again

sections.label: Intro
lines: (A G C D)
When the Lord restored our weary hearts,
Dreams of freedom lit the dark,
The echoes of joy were like a song,
A symphony where we belong.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: (A G C D)
We laughed aloud, our voices soared,
The nations saw the grace outpoured.
They marveled at what He has done,
A love that shines brighter than the sun.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: (A C G D)
Oh, the seeds of sorrow we have sown,
Now bloom in fields of mercy grown.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: (G C D G)
Restore us again, oh Lord of light,
Like streams that flow through desert nights.
Tears we've sown now reap with joy,
Laughter's harvest to employ.
Oh, restore us again!

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: (A G C D)
Those who walk through shadows deep,
Will find their joy in what they reap.
For every tear, a song is raised,
In boundless love, we give You praise.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: (G D A C)
Oh, how the dawn dispels the night,
Your mercy's glow, our guiding light.
Forever we'll sing, forever we’ll soar,
Bound to Your grace forevermore.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: (G C D G)
Restore us again, oh Lord of light,
Like streams that flow through desert nights.
Tears we've sown now reap with joy,
Laughter's harvest to employ.
Oh, restore us again!

sections.label: Outro
lines: (A G C D)
Restore, restore, oh Lord of grace,
Our hearts will dance in Your embrace.

epigraph: When the LORD turned again the captivity of Zion
